scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,orchestrator,executor -c auto "pnpm --filter @autopoly/web dev" "pnpm --filter @autopoly/orchestrator dev" "pnpm --filter @autopoly/executor dev"
scripts.trial:recommend: pnpm --filter @autopoly/contracts build && pnpm --filter @autopoly/db build && pnpm --filter @autopoly/orchestrator trial:recommend
scripts.trial:approve: pnpm --filter @autopoly/contracts build && pnpm --filter @autopoly/db build && pnpm --filter @autopoly/orchestrator trial:approve
scripts.trial:reset-paper: pnpm --filter @autopoly/contracts build && pnpm --filter @autopoly/db build && pnpm --filter @autopoly/orchestrator trial:reset-paper
scripts.trial:run: pnpm --filter @autopoly/contracts build && pnpm --filter @autopoly/db build && pnpm --filter @autopoly/orchestrator trial:run
scripts.daily:pulse: pnpm --filter @autopoly/contracts build && pnpm --filter @autopoly/terminal-ui build && tsx scripts/daily-pulse.ts
scripts.live:test: pnpm --filter @autopoly/contracts build && pnpm --filter @autopoly/db build && pnpm --filter @autopoly/terminal-ui build && tsx scripts/live-test.ts
scripts.live:test:stateless: pnpm --filter @autopoly/contracts build && pnpm --filter @autopoly/terminal-ui build && tsx scripts/live-test-stateless.ts
